scripts.build: pnpm --filter @loamlog/core run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/archive run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/provider-opencode run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/cli run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/plugin-opencode run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @loamlog/core run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/archive run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/provider-opencode run build && pnpm --filter @loamlog/core run typecheck && pnpm --filter @loamlog/archive run typecheck && pnpm --filter @loamlog/provider-opencode run typecheck && pnpm --filter @loamlog/cli run typecheck && pnpm --filter @loamlog/plugin-opencode run typecheck
